productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid Black Jacket
description: Composition Black jacket with the shell made of 100% cotton and lining made of 65% polyester and 35% cotton, has full sleeves, a mock collar, zippered front placket with buttonable covering, two pockets on the chest with press button closures, and stitch detailing Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash with cold water Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach, iron or wring Dry in shade This jacket coat from united colors of benetton is the perfect piece for winter versatility. Pair it with jeans and suede shoes, or wear unbuttoned with a monochrome shirt and form fitting jeans. Ankle high boots look best with this piece. Model statistics The product is a a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18&rdquo
